calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Steamboat Partners, LLC, as assignee of Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Celia M. Olmos, aka Celia Olmos.
Court ordered defendants Does 1-10 Dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of William Schmiederer and Exhibit 1 attached admitted in evidence.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff STEAMBOAT PARTNERS, LLC, as assignee of WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. and against Defendant CELIA M. OLMOS, aka CELIA OLMOS, as follows:
Principal $10,078.23
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $420.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,498.23
Judgment signed in open court.
Court ordered Declaration and Exhibit 1 returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff STEAMBOAT PARTNERS, LLC'S, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted And Request For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 is Denied. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's orders issued on July 25, 2013 and August 1, 2013. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey R. Windsor; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Continued To Aug-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on THU-AUG-01-2013:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. [415.922.5939] specially appearing for STEAMBOAT PARTNERS, LLC, plaintiff / moving party;
No appearance by or on behalf of defendant.

The Court modifies its tentative ruling. Plaintiff STEAMBOAT PARTNERS, LLC, as assignee of WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion to Deem Facts as Admitted and Request for Attorney Fees of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee of $60.00 is continued to AUG-08-2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 1, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00

No appearances on this matter.
